title: 'I like their money': Trump threatens lawsuits against ABC for reporting on Reflecting Pool
title_zh: “我喜欢他们的钱”：特朗普威胁对美国广播公司（ABC）提起诉讼，因为它报道了《倒影池》
text: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.
zh: 针对美国广播公司的最新行动正值该广播公司面临联邦通信委员会的两项调查之际。

title: How a $4 billion Indian startup won Meta's backing but lost its founder to WhatsApp
title_zh: 一家价值 40 亿美元的印度初创公司如何赢得 Meta 的支持，但却将创始人输给了 WhatsApp
text: Indian fintech startup Cred will raise $900 million in a round led by Meta, but has lost its founder and CEO to WhatsApp.
zh: 印度金融科技初创公司 Cred 将在 Meta 领投的一轮融资中筹集 9 亿美元，但其创始人兼首席执行官已被 WhatsApp 取代。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Tackling EV trucks after success with cars
title_zh: CNBC 的《The China Connection》时事通讯：在汽车取得成功后应对电动卡车
text: Beijing's latest push into electric trucks has echoes of measures announced more than a decade ago to develop new energy passenger cars.
zh: 北京对电动卡车的最新推动与十多年前宣布的发展新能源乘用车的措施相呼应。

title: China's 618 shopping festival growth slows sharply as consumer spending malaise persists
title_zh: 消费者支出持续低迷，中国618购物节增速大幅放缓
text: The latest consumer data reinforce how consumption in China remains subdued.
zh: 最新的消费者数据凸显了中国的消费依然低迷。

title: Oil prices rise as investors continue to watch U.S.-Iran moves, Citi sees 'overhang' disappearing
title_zh: 投资者继续关注美伊动向，油价上涨，花旗认为“悬而未决”正在消失
text: Oil rises slightly early Tuesday as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East, while showing optimism the conflict may end soon.
zh: 周二早盘油价小幅上涨，投资者继续评估中东的最新事态发展，同时对冲突可能很快结束表示乐观。

title: These 6 fast-growing stocks sit at the cutting edge of space and military technology
title_zh: 这 6 只快速增长的股票处于太空和军事技术的前沿
text: In the wake of the SpaceX IPO, investors can expect global communications and AI data processing — both via satellites — to be important themes for many years.
zh: 在 SpaceX 首次公开募股之后，投资者可以预期全球通信和人工智能数据处理（均通过卫星）将成为多年来的重要主题。

text: Rep. Ro Khanna, D-Calif., has been a critic of the Elon-Musk-led Department of Government Efficiency cuts.
zh: 加利福尼亚州民主党众议员罗·卡纳一直批评埃隆·马斯克领导的政府效率部削减计划。

title: Beijing is summoning executives again, but here's why that's causing less worry than in 2021
title_zh: 北京再次召集高管，但这就是为什么这比 2021 年引起的担忧要少
text: Beijing is summoning tech executives for meetings as it did in 2021, but now it has less room to wield a heavy hand due to deflation and rivalry with the U.S.
zh: 北京正像 2021 年那样召集科技高管开会，但现在由于通货紧缩和与美国的竞争，其采取高压手段的空间较小。

title: 'We'll see' — Trump hedges on guarantee Iran won't use oil profits to rebuild military
title_zh: “我们拭目以待”——特朗普对冲保证伊朗不会利用石油利润重建军事
text: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent authorized the import of Iranian oil and refined products into the U.S. through at least August.
zh: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特授权至少在八月份之前将伊朗石油和成品油进口到美国。

title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
title_zh: 特斯拉 Model 3 撞上德克萨斯州民宅，导致 76 岁老人死亡，特斯拉面临联邦调查
text: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.
zh: 哈里斯县当局表示，司机迈克尔·巴特勒表示，他一直在使用特斯拉的部分自动驾驶系统。

title: Trump may say he’s banning Wall Street from buying homes. Does the bipartisan housing bill actually do that?
title_zh: 特朗普可能会说他正在禁止华尔街购买房屋。两党住房法案真的能做到这一点吗？
text: The measure “will take time to meaningfully affect housing affordability and will not resolve voter frustration in that area,” analysts said.
zh: 分析师表示，该措施“需要时间才能对住房负担能力产生有意义的影响，并且不会解决该地区选民的不满情绪”。

title: Big Tech has split into two artificial-intelligence camps — but the smart money isn’t chasing the next OpenAI
title_zh: 大型科技公司已分裂为两个人工智能阵营——但聪明的资金并不会追逐下一个 OpenAI
text: Why tech giants such as Alphabet and Microsoft are the safer choice in the AI race.
zh: 为什么 Alphabet 和微软等科技巨头是人工智能竞赛中更安全的选择。

title: A 40% market crash is lurking in the IPO pipeline. SpaceX and OpenAI could trigger it.
title_zh: IPO 过程中潜伏着 40% 的市场崩盘。 SpaceX 和 OpenAI 可能会触发它。
text: Prior records for U.S. equity issuance came in 1929 and 2000 — and we all know what happened next.
zh: 美国股票发行的先前记录出现在 1929 年和 2000 年，我们都知道接下来发生了什么。

title: China’s weird new economic spark: toy elves and robocops
title_zh: 中国奇怪的新经济火花：玩具精灵和机械战警
text: Young Chinese aren’t buying status symbols. They’re spending money on things that make them feel something — anything.
zh: 中国年轻人不买身份象征。他们把钱花在能让他们感受到某种东西的东西上——任何东西。

title: Wall Street loves growth stocks — but these 10 ‘losers’ are primed to win
title_zh: 华尔街钟爱成长型股票——但这10只“失败者”已准备好获胜
text: Elon Musk’s $1 trillion SpaceX prediction is probably wrong. Contrarian investors are buying these out-of-favor value plays instead.
zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 对 SpaceX 价值 1 万亿美元的预测可能是错误的。逆向投资者转而买入这些不受欢迎的价值股。

title: Caterpillar’s stock hits a milestone as AI-fueled industrials rally sweeps up Wall Street
title_zh: 随着人工智能推动的工业股席卷华尔街，卡特彼勒股价达到里程碑
text: Caterpillar is the hottest stock in the Dow this year, and now one of just two in the index with a share price above $1,000.
zh: 卡特彼勒是今年道琼斯指数中最热门的股票，也是该指数中仅有的两只股价超过 1,000 美元的股票之一。

text: China’s stockmarket rally may hurt the economy The Economist
zh: 《经济学人》：中国股市上涨可能会损害经济

title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
title_zh: Kalshi 交易员押注芯片价格下跌，英伟达股价陷入困境
text: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.
zh: 英伟达的股价最近一直在下滑，卡尔希交易员预测该公司的芯片收费也在下降。

title: Amazon Prime Day arrives earlier this year. Here's why Wall Street is watching closely
title_zh: 亚马逊 Prime Day 今年早些时候到来。这就是华尔街密切关注的原因
text: This year could see a major drive to everyday essentials, a growing category for the e-commerce giant's annual shopping event.
zh: 今年可能会出现对日常必需品的大力推动，这是这家电子商务巨头年度购物活动中不断增长的类别。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: The momentum trades of 2026 are breaking with gold, silver and South Korea down big
title_zh: 2026年的势头交易正在被打破，黄金、白银和韩国大幅下跌
text: Each of these assets caught a bid this year as investors nervous about their exposure to U.S. large cap tech sought out different asset classes.
zh: 由于投资者对美国大型科技公司的风险敞口感到紧张，因此这些资产今年都受到了竞购，纷纷寻求不同的资产类别。

title: Super Micro’s stock is seeing its best run in a year thanks to Nvidia partnership
title_zh: 得益于与英伟达的合作，超微的股价创下一年来的最佳表现
text: Super Micro shares were leading the S&P 500’s gainers on Monday.
zh: 周一，超微股价领涨标准普尔 500 指数。

title: Micron’s stock momentum builds as the company inks a new Anthropic partnership
title_zh: 随着公司签署新的 Anthropic 合作伙伴关系，美光的股票势头增强
text: The companies announce a supply agreement for memory and storage.
zh: 两家公司宣布达成内存和存储供应协议。

title: Salesforce’s stock extends record losing streak. Can the company disrupt itself?
title_zh: Salesforce 的股价延续了创纪录的跌势。公司能否自我颠覆？
text: Shares of Salesforce posted their 14th consecutive day of losses as investors remain unconvinced of the company’s AI momentum.
zh: 由于投资者仍不相信该公司的人工智能发展势头，Salesforce 的股价连续 14 天下跌。

title: Alphabet sees $225 billion market-cap wipeout as investors fear it’s losing the war for AI talent
title_zh: Alphabet 预计市值将蒸发 2250 亿美元，投资者担心该公司会在人工智能人才争夺战中失败
text: Two AI leaders, including a Nobel laureate, recently said they would leave Google for rival labs.
zh: 包括一位诺贝尔奖获得者在内的两位人工智能领导者最近表示，他们将离开谷歌前往竞争对手的实验室。

title: A major chip index has doubled this year despite Nvidia ranking dead last
title_zh: 尽管英伟达排名垫底，但今年主要芯片指数已翻倍
text: “Nvidia has gotten so large that its ability to beat expectations has gotten much smaller,” an analyst says.
zh: 一位分析师表示：“英伟达已经变得如此庞大，超出预期的能力变得越来越小。”

title: SpaceX sheds $400 billion in value as stock slides below its IPO-day closing price
title_zh: 由于股价跌破 IPO 日收盘价，SpaceX 市值缩水 4000 亿美元
text: Anyone who bought SpaceX’s stock after the first trading day is now underwater on those purchases — at least on paper.
zh: 任何在第一个交易日后购买 SpaceX 股票的人现在都在这些购买上陷入困境——至少在纸面上是这样。

title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
title_zh: 我的房客在我的桌子上留下了热痕。直到她走了我才注意到他们。我是否要求她付费才能删除它们？
text: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”
zh: “让我发疯的是她没有提到这件事。”

title: ‘Passion is overrated:’ This CEO didn’t build her career doing what she loved — and says you shouldn’t either
title_zh: “激情被高估了：”这位首席执行官并没有通过她喜欢的事情来建立自己的职业生涯 - 并且说你也不应该这样做
text: “There are different ways to get happiness at work beyond your work being your passion.”
zh: “除了把工作当作你的热情之外，还有不同的方法可以在工作中获得快乐。”

title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
title_zh: 高调退出后，Alphabet因人工智能担忧而迎来一年来最糟糕的一天
text: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.
zh: 谷歌母公司 Alphabet 连续出现了备受瞩目的人工智能研究人员离职。

title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
title_zh: SpaceX 与开源人工智能初创公司 Reflection 签署价值高达 63 亿美元的计算能力协议
text: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.
zh: SpaceX 已将其 Colossus 数据中心转变为商业计算能力平台，最近与 Anthropic、Google 和 Cursor 达成了协议。

title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
title_zh: 本周值得关注的三只关键人工智能股票，交易员预计将出现大幅波动
text: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.
zh: 美光科技和 Cerebras 本周发布报告。超微的期权活动也很活跃。

title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
title_zh: 参议院准备推进住房法案，限制私募股权购买单户住宅
text: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.
zh: 预计国会参众两院本周将推进一项庞大的住房一揽子计划，旨在创造更多供应并使住房更便宜。

title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
title_zh: Meta 的 WhatsApp 负责人辞职，由印度金融科技创始人 Kunal Shah 接任
text: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.
zh: 威尔·卡思卡特 (Will Cathcart) 将辞去 WhatsApp 负责人职务，转而担任公司的另一个职位。库纳尔·沙阿将接任。

title: Vance hails 'great progress' in U.S.-Iran talks despite 'threatening' and 'whining'
title_zh: 尽管受到“威胁”和“抱怨”，万斯仍称赞美伊谈判取得“巨大进展”
text: JD Vance said U.S.-Iran talks in Switzerland made progress, with Tehran agreeing to allow IAEA inspectors back into Iran.
zh: 万斯表示，美伊在瑞士举行的会谈取得了进展，德黑兰同意允许国际原子能机构视察员重返伊朗。

title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
title_zh: 有人能加入马斯克的万亿富翁俱乐部吗？根据预测市场，扎克伯格是最好的选择
text: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.
zh: Meta 首席执行官被认为是继特斯拉和 SpaceX 首席执行官之后的下一位首席执行官。英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋被认为是第二个最有可能的人。

title: Apple is a notable outlier in Monday's drubbing of mega-cap tech stocks
title_zh: 苹果是周一大型科技股惨败中的一个明显异常者
text: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
zh: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布最后冲刺；下午交易最后一小时的可行更新。

title: Who is Andy Burnham? And 4 other things investors should know as the UK replaces its prime minister
title_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆是谁？英国更换首相之际投资者还应该了解的其他 4 件事
text: Keir Starmer’s exit puts Andy Burnham, gilts, sterling and the next UK chancellor in focus for investors.
zh: 基尔·斯塔默的退出使安迪·伯纳姆、英国国债、英镑和下一任英国财政大臣成为投资者关注的焦点。

title: Child care tax breaks can save families and businesses money — but few use them, congressional report finds
title_zh: 国会报告发现，儿童保育税收减免可以为家庭和企业节省资金，但很少有人使用它们
text: Child care can be expensive for both parents and their employers. Yet existing tax incentives to help defray those costs may go unused, a new report finds.
zh: 对于父母及其雇主来说，儿童保育费用可能很高。然而，一份新报告发现，现有的有助于支付这些成本的税收激励措施可能会被闲置。

title: Shipping stalls in Strait of Hormuz after Iran declares key waterway closed again
title_zh: 伊朗宣布再次关闭主要水道后霍尔木兹海峡航运陷入停滞
text: The update comes even as industry trackers showed Iranian tankers have continued to sail through the strait.
zh: 尽管行业追踪显示伊朗油轮继续在该海峡航行，但这一更新还是发布了。

title: How to pick up some quick income using an auto stock hitting its stride
title_zh: 如何利用汽车股的上涨来快速获得收入
text: With broader macro uncertainties driving pocketed volatility across the automotive sector, patient options traders have an exceptional set-up to harvest high-quality premiums.
zh: 由于更广泛的宏观不确定性推动整个汽车行业的波动，耐心的期权交易者拥有特殊的设置来收获高质量的溢价。

title: 2-year Treasury note yield hits highest since February 2025
title_zh: 2年期国债收益率创2025年2月以来最高
text: U.S. Treasury yields climbed on Monday, pushing the 2-year yield to its highest since early last year.
zh: 美国国债收益率周一攀升，将两年期国债收益率推升至去年初以来的最高水平。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
title_zh: 美国财政部授权伊朗石油销售直至八月
text: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the region loaded with oil.
zh: 伊朗超级油轮在战争期间陷入黑暗后，在满载石油离开该地区时打开了应答器。

title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
text: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

title: UK PM Starmer resigns as Britain faces its seventh leader in 10 years
title_zh: 英国首相斯塔默辞职，英国面临十年来第七位领导人
text: Keir Starmer said he will resign as U.K. prime minister and Labour leader, triggering a contest to choose his successor.
zh: 凯尔·斯塔默表示，他将辞去英国首相和工党领袖的职务，引发了一场选择继任者的竞赛。

title: UPS to invest $48 million in temperature-controlled facilities amid healthcare boom
title_zh: UPS 将在医疗保健热潮中投资 4800 万美元用于温控设施
text: UPS is announcing a new investment in healthcare logistics as demand for the temperature-controlled category booms, CNBC has learned exclusively.
zh: 据 CNBC 独家获悉，随着温控品类需求的激增，UPS 宣布对医疗保健物流进行一项新投资。

title: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
title_zh: “失败的奖励”：投资者对塔吉特董事长布莱恩康奈尔的支持降至有史以来的最低水平
text: Target chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.
zh: Target 董事长布莱恩·康奈尔 (Brian Cornell) 将这家零售商打造成价值超过 1000 亿美元的巨头，但最近的困境和业绩不佳引发了投资者要求变革的呼声。

title: Chevron to fuel massive Microsoft data center in Texas using natural gas
title_zh: 雪佛龙将使用天然气为德克萨斯州的大型微软数据中心提供燃料
text: Microsoft's embrace of natural gas shows a willingness to invest in fossil fuels to meet the power demand needed in its data centers.
zh: 微软对天然气的拥抱表明了其投资化石燃料以满足其数据中心所需电力需求的意愿。

title: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
title_zh: 首席运营官马克·温特霍夫 (Marc Winterhoff) 离职，Lucid 将裁员约 18% 的美国员工
text: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.
zh: 作为成本节约计划的一部分，Lucid Group 将在美国裁员 18%。它还表示，首席运营官马克·温特霍夫(Marc Winterhoff)将立即离职。

title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
title_zh: 公司要求各州减少繁文缛节。对数据中心持谨慎态度的选民可能会有不同的想法
text: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.
zh: 去年 6 月，宾夕法尼亚州州长乔什·夏皮罗 (Josh Shapiro) 宣扬了一项 200 亿美元的经济发展协议，这是该州有史以来最大的一笔。这让夏皮罗不乏悲伤。

title: The No. 1 question ultra-high net worth families should ask a financial advisor
title_zh: 超高净值家庭应该询问财务顾问的第一个问题
text: The financial needs of the uber-rich are often complex. Here's how an ultra-high net worth family can gauge a prospective financial advisor.
zh: 超级富豪的财务需求往往很复杂。以下是超高净值家庭如何衡量未来的财务顾问。

title: SpaceX makes bond sale days after record IPO, discloses over $100 billion cash pile
title_zh: SpaceX 在创纪录的 IPO 几天后发行债券，披露了超过 1000 亿美元的现金储备
text: SpaceX on Monday unveiled a senior unsecured notes offering and said it held about $100.8 billion in cash.
zh: SpaceX 周一推出了一项高级无担保票据发行，并表示其持有约 1008 亿美元现金。

title: CNBC Elite Advisors: Top ultra-high net worth wealth management firms for 2026
title_zh: CNBC Elite Advisors：2026 年顶级超高净值财富管理公司
text: CNBC Elite Advisors recognizes wealth management firms serving high net worth and UHNW clients.
zh: CNBC 精英顾问认可为高净值和超高净值客户提供服务的财富管理公司。

title: SpaceX stock falls 8%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
title_zh: IPO 火热后，SpaceX 股价下跌 8%，连续第三个交易日下跌
text: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.
zh: 该公司 6 月 12 日破纪录的 IPO 后的涨势已经降温，过去两个交易日全天股价下跌。

title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
title_zh: 俱乐部周一股市最值得关注的十大事件
text: Abbvie makes a move in M&A, and SpaceX is started with a hold rating at KeyBanc.
zh: 艾伯维 (Abbvie) 采取并购行动，而 SpaceX 则在 KeyBanc 上获得持有评级。

title: The new arms race in wealth management: Winning the ultra-wealthy
title_zh: 财富管理新军备竞赛：赢得超级富豪
text: Most registered investment advisors say they serve wealthy clients. The CNBC Elite Advisors list aims to help ultra-high net worth investors narrow the field.
zh: 大多数注册投资顾问表示，他们为富有的客户提供服务。 CNBC 精英顾问名单旨在帮助超高净值投资者缩小投资范围。

title: Pixar's 'Toy Story 5' lassos biggest opening weekend in franchise history with $160 million haul
title_zh: 皮克斯的《玩具总动员 5》创下系列历史上最大的首周末票房收入 1.6 亿美元
text: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.
zh: 迪士尼和皮克斯出品的《玩具总动员 5》在首映周末国内票房收入达到 1.6 亿美元，创下该系列历史上首映票房最高纪录。

title: CNBC Daily Open: U.K.'s Keir Starmer on the verge of quitting
title_zh: CNBC 每日公开赛：英国选手凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 濒临退出
text: A war of words in Westminster could cost U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer his job, as the leader looks set to resign amid pressure from within his party.
zh: 威斯敏斯特的一场口水战可能会让英国首相基尔·斯塔默丢掉饭碗，因为这位领导人在党内压力下似乎准备辞职。

title: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of U.S. firms in retaliation for Pentagon blacklist
title_zh: 中国对数十家美国公司实施贸易限制以报复五角大楼黑名单
text: The Pentagon earlier this month updated its so-called 1260H list by adding a slew of Chinese technology companies to a roster of entities it believes have aided Beijing's military.
zh: 五角大楼本月早些时候更新了所谓的 1260H 名单，将大量中国科技公司添加到其认为帮助过北京军方的实体名单中。

title: Why a 66-year-old water treaty is becoming the latest India-Pakistan flashpoint
title_zh: 为什么已有 66 年历史的水条约正在成为印巴最新的爆发点
text: India and Pakistan are locked in a dispute over the Indus Water Treaty after New Delhi suspended the pact, raising concerns about regional stability.
zh: 新德里暂停《印度河水条约》后，印度和巴基斯坦陷入争议，引发了对地区稳定的担忧。

title: The best parents and leaders use a 3-step formula to help people handle uncertainty, says Dr. Becky Kennedy
title_zh: 贝基·肯尼迪博士表示，最好的父母和领导者会使用三步公式来帮助人们应对不确定性
text: Even if you can't control an outcome, you can still help your child or co-worker feel more at ease with uncertainty, just by how you describe a situation.
zh: 即使您无法控制结果，您仍然可以通过如何描述情况来帮助您的孩子或同事在不确定性中感到更加自在。

title: Here are 3 big things to watch in the stock market this coming week
title_zh: 本周股市有3件值得关注的大事
text: FedEx reports earnings, and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge is due out.
zh: 联邦快递公布财报，美联储首选的通胀指标即将公布。

title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
title_zh: 没有人希望人工智能数据中心位于地球上。它们在太空中有意义吗？
text: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.
zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 在轨道人工智能数据中心上下了重注。公众不希望它们出现在地球上，但太空基地的经济理由值得怀疑。

title: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
title_zh: 提高最低工资是一个巨大的政治赢家。现在遇到了阻力
text: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.
zh: 提高最低工资一直是投票箱中进步政策的赢家，但最近的失败表明经济情绪放缓了其政治势头。

title: Republicans buy crypto more than Democrats, data shows — what's driving the divide
title_zh: 数据显示，共和党人比民主党人购买加密货币更多——是什么造成了这种分歧
text: "There's a massive, massive partisan gap," of crypto adoption between Democrats and Republicans. Here's why.
zh: 民主党和共和党之间在加密货币的采用方面存在“巨大的党派分歧”。原因如下。

title: She saved $24,000 to launch a craft festival in an old Joann store: 'This is my dream come true'
title_zh: 她节省了 24,000 美元，在乔安的一家老商店举办了一场手工艺节：“这是我的梦想成真”
text: "This is my dream come true," says Tetef, a long-time events producer. "I just want to go to a thing where everyone's sitting down making stuff."
zh: “这是我的梦想成真，”长期担任活动制作人的特特夫说。 “我只是想去一个每个人都坐下来制作东西的地方。”

title: The No. 1 trick I always teach to build unshakeable confidence—it worked for Beyoncé and Adele
title_zh: 我一直教的建立不可动摇自信的第一招——它对碧昂斯和阿黛尔有效
text: "No matter how talented or prepared you are, self-doubt can get in your way," says therapist Amy Morin. Here's how to channel your alter ego so you can do your best.
zh: “无论你多么有才华或准备如何，自我怀疑都会阻碍你，”治疗师艾米·莫林说。以下是如何引导你的另一个自我，以便你可以做到最好。
